title: helianthemum pilosum var. faurei
intro: Helianthemum pilosum var. faurei, also known as a type of Rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum pilosum var. faurei include treating wounds, skin conditions such as eczema, and other inflammatory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, often used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
